name: Knowsley Safari Park
description: Knowsley Safari is a safari park and tourist attraction in Prescot, Merseyside, England.  It is a member of the British and Irish Association of Zoos and Aquariums (BIAZA) and the European Association of Zoos and Aquaria (EAZA).  It contributes to conservation and research through links with conservation projects and its links with universities in nearby Liverpool, as well as Chester and Manchester.
